parents.subject: LU-14947 tests: recovery-small 26b to create file on MDT0

commit.subject: LU-17532 ptlrpc: LASSERT replaced by CERROR
commit.message:
LU-17532 ptlrpc: LASSERT replaced by CERROR

In server_bulk_callback, an error in an event, because of bad data
received, can be handled gently (using a CERROR) instead of a crash
with LASSERT.

Signed-off-by: Cyril Bordage <cbordage@whamcloud.com>
Test-Parameters: trivial
Change-Id: Ic542c2a14e14335ad9ae9f699fa62bb79684a5eb
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/58356
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Frank Sehr <fsehr@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Serguei Smirnov <ssmirnov@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
